creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2010-05-21 11:13:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/mutt-devel      Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/mutt-devel/files patch-buffy.c 
  Log:
  - Fix a SIGSEGV problem when unsubscribing IMAP folders.
    Taken from upstream bug-id #3273 (Do not free statically-allocated
    buffy buffer.)
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             146690
  Submitted by:   Udo Schweigert <udo.schweigert@siemens.com> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.310     +1 -1      ports/mail/mutt-devel/Makefile
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/mail/mutt-devel/files/patch-buffy.c (new)
